description: Self-hosted, fully offline AI-powered development platform — Monaco IDE + WPF Windows client + Arbiter Engine agentic backend.

milestones.title: Foundation
milestones.description: Core WPF shell, Python bridge, chat, voice, personas, projects, git, build/run/test.

tasks.title: WPF application shell (MainWindow, ProjectWindow, WorkspaceWindow)
FastAPI Python bridge (fastapi_bridge.py) on port 8000
ChatGPT-style web chat UI (static/index.html)
Hardware-aware LLM loading (GGUF + Ollama + stub)
TTS voice output (pyttsx3 / System.Speech)
STT voice input (Whisper / Windows Speech)
Persona system (Arbiter / Coder / Teacher / Organizer)
Per-project SQLite conversation history
Project workspace management + file tree
Git integration (LibGit2Sharp — commit, push, pull, branch, log)
Build / run / test loop with auto-command detection
Automated model download (HuggingFace Hub)
Dark theme (VS Code-inspired) across all WPF windows

milestones.title: IDE Integration — Monaco Editor + WebView2
milestones.description: Embed Monaco IDE (from SwissAgent) into the WPF client via WebView2. All AI features connect directly to the editor.

tasks.title: PDF viewer window (WebView2, read-only)
LauncherWindow — startup picker (ArbiterAI vs Arbiter Engine)
AppConfig static class — mode + API URL shared across all windows
Auto-open web chat in browser on app launch
SwissAgent Monaco GUI downloaded, renamed Arbiter, served from /gui/
File CRUD API endpoints (/files, /files/read, /files/write, /files/delete, /files/rename)
AI code action endpoints (/ai/complete, /ai/action, /ai/propose)
WebSocket streaming endpoints (/ws/run, /ws/terminal, /ws/pty)
Git API endpoints (/git/clone, /git/status, /git/stage, /git/commit, /git/log, /git/diff)
Assistant chat endpoints for IDE (/assistant/chat, /assistant/chat/agentic)
Scaffold / template / refactor / brainstorm / docgen endpoints
Stub endpoints for all 40+ advanced module features
IdeWindow.xaml — WPF window hosting Monaco IDE via WebView2
IdeWindow.xaml.cs — native tool-call bridge (WPF ↔ Monaco JS postMessage)
IDE toolbar: open project, save, build, run, test buttons in WPF chrome
WPF file picker integration (open/save dialogs called from IDE JS)
LauncherWindow updated to open IDE window as main interface

milestones.title: Arbiter Engine — Full Agentic Backend
milestones.description: Complete Python agent engine with 200+ tools, 12 LLM backends, plugin/module system, and self-build loop. Rewritten from SwissAgent with Arbiter naming.

tasks.title: Core engine: agent, config_loader, logger, permission, task_runner, tool_registry
AgenticChatEngine: plan → file-edit → diff → summarise loop
SelfBuildLoop: roadmap-driven autonomous patch → test → commit cycle
LLM factory + 12 backends (Ollama, OpenAI, Anthropic, Gemini, llama.cpp, LM Studio, LocalAI, Open WebUI, Tabby, local stub)
Module loader (module.json + tools.json discovery)
Plugin loader (plugin.json + dynamic tool registration)
ArbiterEngine bridge server (server.py, port 8001, same API contract as bridge)
setup_modules.py — sparse-clone 42-module toolset
configs/config.toml — full runtime configuration
Module installation and validation (run setup_modules.py)
Hot-reload plugins without server restart
Tool call streaming (SSE / WebSocket) for long-running tools
Multi-agent orchestration (spawn sub-agents per task)
Self-build: integrate with IDE roadmap panel for live progress display

milestones.title: Archive & Library — Living Knowledge Codex
milestones.description: Configurable library folders that Arbiter monitors, indexes, and builds into a searchable Archive (the Codex). Used as persistent AI context.

tasks.title: library_manager.py — library path CRUD stored in Memory/library_config.json
archive_manager.py — ArchiveEntry dataclass, Archive class, JSON persistence
Code extraction: Python AST (functions/classes/docstrings), regex for JS/TS/C#/Go/Rust
Doc extraction: Markdown section + fenced code blocks, plain text chunking
AI-generated summaries: LLM writes one-line summary per Archive entry
Background file watcher: scan library folders every 30s, re-index changed files
Keyword search: score entries by query term frequency across title/summary/content/tags
Archive context injection: top-k relevant entries prepended to AI system prompt
Markdown export: GET /archive/export → full Archive as a .md codex document
Archive REST API: GET /archive, POST /archive/rebuild, GET /archive/search, DELETE /archive/entry/{id}
Library REST API: GET/POST/DELETE /library, GET /library/files, GET /library/file
Library & Archive sidebar panel in Monaco IDE web UI
Archive viewer: search box, entry list, content preview, rebuild button

milestones.title: WPF IDE — Full Native Client
milestones.description: The WPF Windows client becomes a full IDE: Monaco editor embedded via WebView2, native tool dispatch, drag-and-drop workspace, WPF-native panels.

tasks.title: IdeWindow.xaml — full-screen WebView2 hosting Monaco IDE
IdeWindow: WebMessageReceived handler — dispatch native tool calls from JS
Native tools: open file/folder dialogs, system notifications, clipboard, drag-drop
WPF status bar: server status, LLM backend, current file, line/col
WPF menu bar: File, Edit, View, Git, Build, Run, AI, Help
Settings panel: library paths, LLM backend, voice, theme, ports
WPF build progress panel: real-time output streamed from /ws/run
Keyboard shortcuts: Ctrl+Shift+P (command palette), Ctrl+B (build), F5 (run)
Multi-window: IDE + Chat side-by-side (dockable WPF windows)
Tray icon: run Arbiter in background, restore from system tray

milestones.title: Advanced AI Capabilities
milestones.description: Multi-agent orchestration, RAG knowledge retrieval, autonomous self-improvement, voice-in-IDE, and AI-powered code review.

tasks.title: RAG search over Archive entries (vector embeddings or BM25)
Multi-agent: spawn specialist sub-agents (DevOps, Security, Docs) per task
Autonomous self-build: AI resolves next roadmap task, patches, tests, commits
Voice in IDE: push-to-talk STT → chat input, TTS reads AI responses aloud
AI code review panel: review open file or diff against AI-style guidelines
Context-aware completions: inject open-file + Archive + project profile into completion
Session memory (key-value) persisted in .arbiter/session_memory.json
Project profile: AI reads project tech stack, conventions, README for context
Automated dependency vulnerability scanning (pip audit / npm audit via AI summary)
Image & diagram generation (Mermaid diagrams via AI, rendered in IDE)

milestones.title: Distribution & Extensibility
milestones.description: Packaging, installer, auto-update, plugin marketplace, and optional cloud sync.

tasks.title: NSIS / Inno Setup installer: bundles WPF app + Python + bridge
Auto-update: check GitHub releases, download and install new version
Plugin marketplace: browse, install, rate community plugins
VS Code extension: Arbiter chat sidebar accessible from VS Code
Cross-platform: Linux / macOS support via Avalonia or .NET MAUI
Optional cloud sync: encrypted project backup to user-owned S3 / Backblaze
CLI: arbiter build / arbiter chat / arbiter archive rebuild from terminal
Docker image: one-command self-hosted Arbiter server
